items.caption: A stylized representation of a data breach concept. in the foreground, there is a red laptop with a rocket ship emerging from its screen, symbolizing the breach of data security. the laptop is set against a vibrant yellow background with a geometric pattern. above the laptop, the word "data" is written in bold blue letters, and below the laptop, the word "breach" is written in bold white letters. the text "1. 2. 3." is placed below the word "breach," suggesting a sequence or steps related to the data breach. the overall style of the image is graphic and appears to be designed for educational or informational purposes, possibly for a business or technology context.
